zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard Mytton於1389年出生在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾韋斯頓 武安德 利札爾德時，他的父親Reginald de Mytton Esq.30歲，母親Eleanor le Skinner32歲。他於1415年9月26日與Margaret Pershal在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾韋斯頓 武安德 利札爾德結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1418年10月26日在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾韋斯頓享年29歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾韋斯頓 武安德 利札爾德。

nameMeanings.name: Mytton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Mitton
meanings: English (Lancashire and Yorkshire): habitational name from any of the places in Lancashire, Yorkshire, and the West Midlands, so named in Old English as ‘farmstead at a river confluence’, from (ge)m̄ȳthe ‘river confluence’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

variants.name: Rikert
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Richard Mytton was born in 1389, in Weston under Lizard, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Reginald de Mytton Esq., was 30 and his mother, Eleanor le Skinner, was 32. He married Margaret Pershal on 26 September 1415, in Weston under Lizard, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 26 October 1418, in Weston, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 29, and was buried in Weston under Lizard, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom.

de.lifeSummary: Als Richard Mytton 1389 in Weston under Lizard, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Reginald de Mytton Esq. 30 und seine Mutter Eleanor le Skinner 32. Er hat am 26. September 1415 in Weston under Lizard, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom Margaret Pershal geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 26. Oktober 1418 im Alter von 29 Jahren in Weston, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Weston under Lizard, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Mytton è nato il nel 1389 nel Weston under Lizard, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Reginald de Mytton Esq., aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Eleanor le Skinner, aveva 32 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Pershal il 26 settembre 1415, nel Weston under Lizard, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. ja.lifeSummary: Richard Myttonが1389年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアウエストン ウンダー リザルドで生まれた時，父Reginald de Mytton Esq.は30歳，母Eleanor le Skinnerは32歳であった。1415年9月26日にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアウエストン ウンダー リザルドでMargaret Pershalと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1418年10月26日にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアウエストンで29歳で死去し，イギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアウエストン ウンダー リザルドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard Mytton(이)가 1389년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 웨스턴 운더 리자르드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Reginald de Mytton Esq.(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Eleanor le Skinner(은)는 32세였다. 그는 1415년 9월 26일 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 웨스턴 운더 리자르드에서 Margaret Pershal(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1418년 10월 26일 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 웨스턴에서 29세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 웨스턴 운더 리자르드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Mytton nasceu em 1389, em Weston under Lizard, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Reginald de Mytton Esq., tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Eleanor le Skinner, tinha 32 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Pershal em 26 de setembro de 1415, em Weston under Lizard, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 26 de outubro de 1418, em Weston, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 29 anos, e foi sepultado em Weston under Lizard, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard Mytton родился в 1389 г. в местности вестон ундир лизард, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Reginald de Mytton Esq. было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Eleanor le Skinner, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Pershal 26 сентября 1415 г. в местности вестон ундир лизард, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 26 октября 1418 г. в местности вестон, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 29 лет и был похоронен в местности вестон ундир лизард, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Richard Mytton nació en 1389, en Weston under Lizard, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Reginald de Mytton Esq., tenía 30 años y su mamá, Eleanor le Skinner, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Margaret Pershal el 26 de septiembre de 1415, en Weston under Lizard, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 26 de octubre de 1418, en Weston, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 29 años, y fue sepultado en Weston under Lizard, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
